75338.subject: 🟪 Happy 214th birthday, America!
75338.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/9f199753-ca31-4e3d-9435-5e12896ecff5/BD_NL_Banner_Heading.png?t=1781793903)
Caption: 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e60d7cde-4250-41f8-9443-28ed51b80560/divider_transparent.png?t=1774649182)
Caption: 

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/3bd8a492-ff61-41db-a7f2-c821d481fd72/BD_NL_QuoteCircle.png?t=1781794162)
Caption: 

“The chief business of the American people is business.”
— _Calvin Coolidge_



----------View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c1352d9e-2118-4a74-9118-544c36e9f6ae/image.png?t=1782941417)
Caption: 

# Happy 214th birthday, America!

Henry Ford wasn’t sure what century the American Revolutionary War belonged to. Quizzed under oath by a hostile attorney, he guessed the US won its independence from Britain in 1812.

A newspaper [dubbed](https://www.jstor.org/stable/25711149?utm_source=chatgpt.com&seq=1) his mistake “the Revolutionary War of 1812 incident.”

The line of questioning was part of the attorney’s effort to portray Ford as unintelligent. (Asked to identify Benedict Arnold, Ford guessed he was a writer.)

But I think that’s unfair. Ford was a titan of industry. Why should he fill his brain with trivia?

Also, America was a country of business, not history. And not just then, in 1919, when Ford was building a world-changing manufacturing business. But from the very beginning.

In [Americana: A 400-Year History of American Capitalism](https://www.amazon.com/Americana-400-Year-History-American-Capitalism/dp/0399563814), Bhu Srinivasan argues that the Mayflower voyage that carried Pilgrims to New England is best understood as a commercial enterprise more akin to venture capital investing than a quest for religious freedom.

“Far from needing escape from the King’s persecution,” he writes, “the Pilgrims voluntarily entered the business of carrying His Majesty’s sovereignty overseas.”

Srinivasan notes that the Pilgrims departed from the Netherlands, not England, and sailed on an English ship with an English crew. The entire undertaking was financed by English investors — the profit-seeking Merchant Adventurers of London.

Half of the Mayflower’s passengers, he adds, were not even members of the Pilgrims’ church, but settlers added to the journey by the investors for their marketable skills.  

It was all remarkably businesslike. The Pilgrims even signed a formal profit-sharing agreement with their investors — the equivalent of a letter of intent or term sheet, as Srinvasan describes it.

He thinks that’s telling. 

“Political refugees generally do not spend the final days before

75337.body:
Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення

Good evening, Elon Musk became the first trillionaire in world history in June, but the rest of the top 10 richest people on the planet didn’t fare so well. Musk is now more than three-and-a-half times richer than the world’s second-wealthiest person, Google cofounder Larry Page. Here’s who else is on the list this month. Speaking of incredibly rich people, here’s how Taylor Swift’s net worth has more than doubled since she became a billionaire. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Grzegorz Wajda/SOPA Images/LightRocket via Getty Images The Numbers Behind The 2026 World Cup Twenty-five teams—and two billionaire players—are competing. Here are more figures to know about soccer’s biggest spectacle. Jon Cherry via Getty Images Trump Reveals More Than $100 Million In Bitcoin Investments The president’s publicly traded company made headlines last summer when it announced plans to invest in bitcoin. It turns out the president himself was also building a crypto stash.

75329.subject: Google Cloud Platform & APIs: платіж відхилено для домену 01FB74-1CEEDC-1297AD
75329.body:
Google Cloud Platform & APIs


Ваша фінансова установа відхилила платіж із Вашого рахунку Mastercard  • •  
• • 5159, зв’язаного з обліковим записом Google Cloud Platform & APIs, для  
домену 01FB74-1CEEDC-1297AD від 1 лип. 2026 р.. Указано таку причину:
На вашому рахунку недостатньо коштів для цієї трансакції.

Сервіс може працювати ще певний час. Проте щоб продовжити користуватися ним  
у майбутньому, Вам потрібно зв’язатися зі своєю фінансовою установою та  
вирішити проблему. Після цього оновіть дані про основний спосіб оплати та  
сплатіть усі заборгованості.

Щоб оновити або змінити основний спосіб оплати:

  Увійдіть в обліковий запис Google Cloud Console  
<https://auth.cloud.google/select-session?flow=unified&continueUrl=https://console.cloud.google/>.

  Відкрийте Меню навігації консолі й виберіть Billing (Платежі).  Якщо у вас  
кілька платіжних облікових записів Google Cloud, дотримуйтесь інструкцій  
нижче.  Виберіть Go to linked billing account (Перейти до зв’язаного  
платіжного облікового запису), щоб керувати платежами Google Cloud для  
поточного проєкту.
  Натисніть Manage billing accounts (Керувати платіжними обліковими  
записами), щоб вибрати інший платіжний обліковий запис Google Cloud.





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Довідковий центр<https://support.google.com/cloud/#topic=6288636>

Зв’язатися з  
нами<https://support.google.com/cloud/contact/cloud_platform_billing>

Ідентифікатор клієнта Google Cloud Platform:  01FB74-1CEEDC-1297AD
Ідентифікатор платіжного профілю:  5477-1873-1527

Google LLC 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

Ми надіслали Вам це обов’язкове службове сповіщення, щоб повідомити про  
важливі зміни в Google Cloud Platform & APIs або Вашому обліковому записі.

Google

75304.subject: POZVÁNKA
75304.body:
Dobrý deň naši snúbenci,

rada by som Vás pozvala na osobné stretnutie pred Vašou svadobnou 
hostinou, ktorá sa bude konať u nás na Bukovine.
Rada by som s Vami prebrala detaily svadby, stretnutie, kde bude 
prítomná už aj moja koordinátorka spravidla trvá cca 1,5 hodinky, prosím 
pripravte si dostatočné časové okno.
Vedeli by ste nám dať časový nástrel stretnutia, aby sme spoločne našli 
prienik v kalendároch?
Sme na Bukovine viac menej denne od cca 8.00 do 16.30 hod.

Ďakujem!
S pozdravom
-- 

Mgr. Michaela Bilá

Head manager Bukovina

+421908 849 791

www.bukovinakosice.sk [1]



Links:
------
[1] http://www.bukovinakosice.sk

75256.subject: Immediate Action Required on 878341164164
75256.body:
We have detected potentially compromised Service Account credentials  
associated with your Google Cloud Platform account.




Google Cloud Platform



MY CONSOLE




Notification Suspicious Activity Alert



Potentially compromised credentials for Google Cloud Platform/API project  
My Roport (id: my-roport)



Dear Customer,


We detected a publicly exposed secret for the following OAuth client  
associated with project 878341164164:

Secret for client  
878341164164-mm5q8t2kuk26dj44prkjvl1k27q15026.apps.googleusercontent.com  
found at the following URL:  
https://github.com/NovosadovO/morning-report/blob/3984b4dc7231193fbaf225b40bf3c09d4fbaa2ff/monitor.py

To prevent potential security and abuse risks, you must take action in  
accordance with our OAuth 2.0 Policies guidance to “handle client  
credentials securely”. Your client secret may have been inadvertently  
published in public sources or websites (for instance, the credentials were  
mistakenly uploaded to a code repository). Please note that as the  
project/account owner, you are responsible for securing your client  
credentials.



Immediate action is required to generate a new secret to continue using  
OAuth. We strongly recommend that you take the following steps:


Log in to the Google Cloud Console.
Generate a new client secret following these instructions.
Update any applications or websites to use the new client secret
Take immediate steps to ensure that your client secrets are not embedded in  
public source code systems, stored in download directories, or  
unintentionally shared in other ways.

Thank you for ensuring that your Google OAuth clients are secure. Together  
we can make sure that you and your users are safe.

Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Team




GO TO MY CONSOLE




Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Trust & Safety




Google

© 2016 Google Inc. 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

You have received this mandatory service announcement to update you about  
important changes to Google Cloud Platform or your account.

75208.subject: Quick Hello from Runable!
75208.body:
Hi,

I'm Abhijeet from team Runable. You're one of our most active users, and I
wanted to reach out personally.

We're looking to feature a few people from our community, and before
anything, I'd just love to connect and hear about your experience, what's
working for you, what's getting in your way, and how Runable has been for
you so far.

Would you be open to a quick chat? Please select your preferred time slot:
https://calendly.com/abhijeet-runable/30min

Thanks for being with us,

Abhijeet
Team Runable
